task: Browse the \"Text Effect\" section and note the file formats (PNG) offered in the first 10 assets.\nwebsite: https://pngtree.com
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the 'Text Effect' section on pngtree.com. It then identified the first 10 assets and, after an initial attempt with `fetch` that failed to retrieve dynamic content, correctly switched to `webfetch` to get the full details for each asset. The agent then extracted the 'File Type' and 'Image Size' information from each of the 10 asset detail pages. The results are presented in a clear, well-formatted table, along with a concise summary and proper citations. The agent's reasoning was sound, adapting its strategy when direct HTML fetching failed, and it efficiently used parallel `webfetch` calls to gather the required data.
